CustomField.description: The Appraised Leasehold Value from the most recent Appraisal with an Appraisal Type of Buyer's Purchase Loan (copies automatically).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The Appraised Leasehold Value from the most recent Appraisal with an Appraisal Type of Buyer's Purchase Loan (copies automatically).
CustomField.label: Appraised Leasehold Value
